sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 8.30 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.8)

statement.latex: Let${ X}$,${ Y}$be Fitting classes of soluble groups which satisfy the Lockett condition, i.~e.${ X} { S}_{ }={ X}_{ }$, \${ Y} { S}_ { } = { Y}_{ }$where${ S}$denotes the Fitting class of all soluble groups and the lower star the bottom group of the Lockett section determined by the given Fitting class. Does${ X} { Y}$satisfy the Lockett condition? Editors' comment (2001):\/ The answer is affirma...

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
